meaning: adj.领导的,第一位的,最主要的
examples: She was leading at the half-way mark.
He's leading in the presidential race.
These are the leading first-round scores.
And Hanks, while undeniably bankable, is, at 50, no longer viable for most leading-man scripts.
Mike will be remembered as an internationally renowned hydrogeochemist and a leading contributor to the IHP.
